name: LWMA-45 + TIP-004
hypothesis: A shorter LWMA window plus an exponential same-algorithm streak penalty improves recovery from abrupt hashrate changes and reduces algorithm dominance without unacceptable chain-health regressions.
benefits: Exponential pressure against repeated wins by one PoW algorithm
tradeoffs: Penalty-driven stalls may worsen cadence in some power distributions

acceptanceCriteria.success: Higher or non-inferior objective success by challenge
acceptanceCriteria.stability: No material decrease in stable-block fraction
acceptanceCriteria.meanBt: Mean block time remains centered near the 120 second network target
acceptanceCriteria.orphans: No material increase in orphan count
acceptanceCriteria.deepestReorg: No increase in deepest reorg under shadow-miner challenges
acceptanceCriteria.worstGap: No unacceptable increase in longest block wait
acceptanceCriteria.diffSwing: Difficulty swing remains explainable and bounded relative to status quo

reproduction.instructions: Run matched challenge cells through the multiplayer simulator and compare /api/research summaries with status quo.
reproduction.seedsOrDataRange: Record commit, simulation version, challenge, and deterministic room PRNG coverage for each evidence batch.

integrity: Manual rounds remain exploratory and excluded from official randomized aggregates; variant IDs and existing research fields remain immutable.

decision.summary: Builtin candidate represented for governance and future evidence tracking; runtime remains defined in server/challenges.js.
